channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19729] sanity test_160l: FAIL: MTIME changelog not recorded
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f95807d7-831c-4f34-adb6-bbd95da7dbdf

test_160l failed with the following error:

== sanity test 160l: Verify that MTIME changelog records contain the parent FID ========================================================== 17:22:08 (1766164928)
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask -n
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+hsm
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=+hsm
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl --device lustre-MDT0000 changelog register -n
CMD: trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0001.changelog_mask -n
CMD: trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0001.changelog_mask=+hsm
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.changelog_mask=+hsm
CMD: trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl --device lustre-MDT0001 changelog register -n
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0002.changelog_mask -n
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0002.changelog_mask=+hsm
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.changelog_mask=+hsm
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl --device lustre-MDT0002 changelog register -n
CMD: trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param mdd.lustre-MDT0003.changelog_mask -n
CMD: trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.lustre-MDT0003.changelog_mask=+hsm
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.changelog_mask=+hsm
CMD: trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl --device lustre-MDT0003 changelog register -n
Registered 4 changelog users: 'cl15 cl15 cl15 cl15'
CMD: trevis-153vm43 /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_users
CMD: trevis-153vm43,trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.changelog_mask=-CREAT
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.changelog_mask=-CREAT
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.changelog_mask=-CREAT
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=-CREAT
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.changelog_mask=-CREAT
CMD: trevis-153vm43,trevis-153vm44 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdd.*.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
mdd.lustre-MDT0001.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
mdd.lustre-MDT0003.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
mdd.lustre-MDT0000.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
mdd.lustre-MDT0002.changelog_mask=-CLOSE
striped dir -i0 -c2 -H all_char /mnt/lustre/d160l.sanity
 sanity test_160l: @@@@@@ FAIL: MTIME changelog not recorded

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/119916 - 6.12.0-55.43.1.el10_0.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/119916 - 6.12.0-55.43.1_lustre.el10.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_160l - MTIME changelog not recorded
item.summary: sanity test_160l: FAIL: MTIME changelog not recorded

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.

comments.comment:
"Sohei Koyama <skoyama@ddn.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64208
Subject: LU-19729 mdd: clamp ctime instead of clearing time flags
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: a0c2a8de32b91da7d4ab49a6a393aec8324d286c

My patch (https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63516) changes the ctime comparison to nanosecond granularity, so it is very likely that it can trigger 160l failures regardless of RHEL version. Please evaluate the failure rate excluding 63516 test.

In my local VM testing, I was only able to reproduce the issue on RHEL 10. After cherry-picking https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63529, the problem was resolved there.

So my question is whether there were any 160l failures on RHEL 9.5 or RHEL 8.10 that cannot be explained by 63516. If such cases exist, that would suggest an additional root cause independent of both RHEL 10 and my patch.

I think the key point is mdd_fix_attr(). If oattr->la_ctime is newer than la->la_ctime (in seconds), atime/mtime/ctime is not updated. 

    if (la->la_valid & LA_CTIME) {
        /**
         * The pure setattr, it has the priority over what is
         * already set, do not drop it if ctime is equal.
         */
        if (la->la_ctime < oattr->la_ctime)
            la->la_valid &= ~(LA_ATIME | LA_MTIME | LA_CTIME);
    }
From the search results of https://testing.whamcloud.com/ sanity/test_160l, this bug also happened on other OS version such as rhel9.5 rhel8.10. And This problem cannot be stably reproduced...

sanityn test 104 also failed with mtime issue on RHEL 10.0 client and server:

== sanityn test 104: Verify that MDS stores atime/mtime/ctime during close ========================================================== 21:10:15 (1766178615)
CMD: onyx-158vm9 lctl get_param -n mdd.*MDT0000*.atime_diff
CMD: onyx-158vm9 lctl set_param -n mdd.*MDT0000*.atime_diff=0
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
1024 bytes (1.0 kB, 1.0 KiB) copied, 0.000957162 s, 1.1 MB/s
CMD: onyx-158vm9 debugfs -c -R 'stat ROOT/f104.sanityn' /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
onyx-158vm9: debugfs 1.47.3-wc2 (11-Nov-2025)
STAT a|m|ctime 1766178616 1766178616 1766178616
MDT a|m|ctime 1766178616 1766178616 1766178616
1+0 records in
1+0 records out
1024 bytes (1.0 kB, 1.0 KiB) copied, 0.000703201 s, 1.5 MB/s
CMD: onyx-158vm9 debugfs -c -R 'stat ROOT/f104.sanityn' /dev/mapper/mds1_flakey
onyx-158vm9: debugfs 1.47.3-wc2 (11-Nov-2025)
STAT a|m|ctime 1766178616 1766178618 1766178618
MDT a|m|ctime 1766178616 1766178616 1766178618
 sanityn test_104: @@@@@@ FAIL: /mnt/lustre/f104.sanityn mtime (1766178618:1766178616) diff

https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f6d8b04f-90c3-4287-accb-3e8582267fa5
